zh.lifeSummary: 當William Huntingfield於1237年8月24日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Roger de Huntingfield42歲，母親Joan de Hobrugg22歲。他於1256年與Emma Grey在英國德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年11月2日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Huntingfield于1237年8月24日出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Roger de Huntingfield42岁，母亲Joan de Hobrugg22岁。他于1256年与Emma Grey在英国德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年11月2日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Huntingfield was born on 24 August 1237, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Huntingfield, was 42 and his mother, Joan de Hobrugg, was 22. He married Emma Grey in 1256, in Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 2 November 1290, in his hometown.

fr.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: Huntingfield with Cookley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Huntingfield est né le 24 août 1237, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Huntingfield, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan de Hobrugg, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma Grey en 1256, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 2 novembre 1290, dans sa ville natale.

de.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: Huntingfield with Cookley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Huntingfield am 24. August 1237 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Huntingfield 42 und seine Mutter Joan de Hobrugg 22. Er hat 1256 in Derby, Derbyshire, England Emma Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 2. November 1290 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Huntingfield è nato il il 24 agosto 1237 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Huntingfield, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Hobrugg, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma Grey nel 1256, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 2 novembre 1290, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Huntingfieldが1237年8月24日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Roger de Huntingfieldは42歳，母Joan de Hobruggは22歳であった。1256年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでEmma Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1290年11月2日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헌틴그필드 위스 쿡리
ko.lifeSummary: William Huntingfield(이)가 1237년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Huntingfield(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Hobrugg(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1256년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 Emma Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 11월 2일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.24 August 1237–Bef 2 November 1290: 24 de agosto de 1237–antes 2 de novembro de 1290
pt.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: Huntingfield with Cookley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Huntingfield nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1237, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Huntingfield, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Hobrugg, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Grey em 1256, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 2 de novembro de 1290, em sua cidade natal.

ru.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: хантингфиелд вит кукли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Huntingfield родился 24 августа 1237 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Huntingfield было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Hobrugg, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Grey в 1256 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 2 ноябрь 1290 г. в его родном городе.

Se casó con Emma Grey en 1256, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 2 de noviembre de 1290, en su pueblo.
